subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which Thou didst separate between Thy loved ones and Thine enemies, and through which was manifested [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به فصلت بین احبائک و اعدائک و به ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
